untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe analysis (primary vs lower timeframe pullback detection and swing high-low retracement percentage threshold) which cannot be expressed in single-timeframe indicators. Requires explicit pullback depth parameter [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] and lower timeframe momentum divergence detection not available in provided indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using pivot-based pullback detection (close near pivot = pullback zone) combined with RSI momentum confirmation and volume confirmation. However, true implementation requires: (1) timeframe switching capability, (2) swing high/low tracking across bars, (3) percentage retracement calculation, (4) multi-timeframe momentum divergence detection. Current ruleset is a simplified proxy only.
